- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Project type: C++ SFML game, Uno-like card game supporting multiple players.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Created project structure with src/, include/, assets/, CMakeLists.txt, README.md, basic classes (Card, Player, Game), main.cpp.

- [x] Customize the Project
	Implemented basic game framework with card representation, player management, turn-based gameplay, AI for non-human players.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions required.

- [x] Compile the Project
	CMake configured, but SFML needs to be installed. User must install SFML 2.5+ and set CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH or SFML_DIR.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Created .vscode/tasks.json for build and compile tasks.

- [x] Launch the Project
	After installing SFML and building, run the executable. Human player interacts via mouse, AI plays automatically.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md created with build and run instructions.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
